narrative: US-Iran peace hopes drive a sharp reversal in war-related risk premiums — DXY -0.16% as risk-premium demand unwinds; EUR/USD firms to 1.1774 on improved risk appetite and Eurozone data. NZD leads G8 (+0.93% avg) vs laggard CAD (-0.61% avg) as the 1.54% spread reflects a commodity-linked growth divergence; gold higher +1.20% near $4,750; equities +1.46%; VIX 17.4. Watch RBNZ rate decision May 27 for hawkish policy cues.
